value_chain_position: Precision power conversion and control equipment supplier to semiconductor fabs and industrial processes — sits in the fab-equipment / power-delivery layer that every advanced node wafer build must traverse.
relative_comps: AEIS holds a near-duopoly with MKS Instruments in RF/DC power delivery to etch and deposition tools — a genuine fab chokepoint. 3-year CAGR is slightly negative (-0.9%) due to the 2023 semi downcycle, but 22% YoY recovery confirms cycle-driven suppression, not secular decline. FCF margin (3.6%) is thin post-cycle; MKS runs comparable margins. AEIS trades at a discount to ENTG on the assumption that power delivery is more commoditizable than high-purity process materials — fair concern, but switching costs from OEM tool qualifications are real.
